title: pellaea nivea f. flavens
intro: Pellaea nivea f. flavens, also known as the golden silver fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pellaea nivea f. flavens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
